[package]
name = "vector-db"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1.0"
hyper = { version = "1.0", features = ["full"] }
tower = "0.4"
tower-http = { version = "0.5", features = ["trace"] }
parking_lot = "0.12"
rayon = "1.8"

[profile.release]
opt-level = 3
target-cpu = "native"
debug = true
lto = false

[package]

version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

axum = "0.7"

debug = true
